prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MINISLUICEBKTKIT-RUB-20PC-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 20pc Portable Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with Pocket Rubber Sluice Box with Bucket Description: If you're looking for a start to finish sluice box gold prospecting kit, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Portable Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit. Intended for end to end raw material processing, this kit includes a comprehensive selection of prospecting tools needed for classification, collection and storage, and is incredibly portable.

And, while the mini 12 inch aluminum sluice box, drawstring backpack and 3.5 gallon bucket make this kit easy to trek to and from a claim site, the supplementary components we've included ensure you're never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field.

The compact 3 in 1 folding shovel and bucket make a great place to start gathering raw material. Once you've filled your bucket, transfer the raw material to stacked mini classifier screens that will sit on top of chosen included dual riffle green gold pans (10, 12 or 14 inch); You've now created an effective classification system to remove undesirable material like rocks and gravel from your pay dirt concentrate. However, before you start panning or sluicing, be sure grab that large 8lb magnetic separator tool. This will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials, making it easier to separate and extract gold from your pay dirt.

Whether you choose to feed your mini rubber sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you've got both options with this kit. The 12 inch mini rubber sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold. And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment Search Terms: cheap beginner gold prospecting tools kit with classifier screens outdoor explorer complete gold pan kit prospectors equipment for adults kids gold nuggets Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT: ASR Outdoor 20pc complete rubber sluice box kit with 3.5 gallon bucket and mini classifier screens is intended for start to finish raw material processing; kit includes everything for collection, recovery and storage and is easily portable! - 12 INCH RUBBER SLUICE BOX: Sluice box features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold; weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment - CLASSIFIER SCREENS: Stack x3 mini sifting screens on top of gold pans to create a seamless material classification system, which removes unwanted material from your pay dirt concentrate, ideal for gold panning or feeding mini rubber sluice box - DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: This gold panning kit comes with a drawstring backpack to hold smaller prospecting tools, keeping them together and organized; drawstring backpack is incredibly lightweight, adding to the transportability of this gold panning kit - PROSPECTING TOOLS: Gold panning kit also includes 4 snifter bottles, 1 8lbs magnetic separator tool, 1 green prospectors scoop, 3 glass vials, 1 pair of magnifying tweezers and a 3 in 1 compact folding shovel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
